title: Pulse Protocol event envelope
description: One session/attention event from a coding agent emitter to a collector. See spec/pulse-protocol.md section 5.

spec_version.description: Protocol version; collectors assume "0.1" when absent.

source.description: Tool identifier in lowercase snake_case. Well-known: claude_code, opencode, kilo, codex, cursor. Unknown values are valid.

instance_id.description: Stable unique id per (host, session); opaque to collectors.

event_type.description: Vocabulary of spec section 6. Collectors treat unknown types as activity.

summary.description: One human-readable line; feeds and notifications show this.

hook_event_name.description: Native event name at the source, for debugging.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC; collector assigns receipt time when absent.
